### Page
- Page URL: https://www.gov.uk/search/research-and-statistics
- Page Title: Research and statistics - GOV.UK

```yaml
              - link "Transparency" [ref=e436] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /search/transparency-and-freedom-of-information-releases
            - listitem [ref=e437]:
              - link "How government works" [ref=e438] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /government/how-government-works
            - listitem [ref=e439]:
              - link "Get involved" [ref=e440] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /government/get-involved
      - separator [ref=e441]
      - generic [ref=e442]:
        - generic [ref=e443]:
          - heading "Support links" [level=2] [ref=e444]
          - list [ref=e445]:
            - listitem [ref=e446]:
              - link "Help" [ref=e447] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /help
            - listitem [ref=e448]:
              - link "Privacy" [ref=e449] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /help/privacy-notice
            - listitem [ref=e450]:
              - link "Cookies" [ref=e451] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /help/cookies
            - listitem [ref=e452]:
              - link "Accessibility statement" [ref=e453] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /help/accessibility-statement
            - listitem [ref=e454]:
              - link "Contact" [ref=e455] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /contact
            - listitem [ref=e456]:
              - link "Terms and conditions" [ref=e457] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /help/terms-conditions
            - listitem [ref=e458]:
              - link "Rhestr o Wasanaethau Cymraeg" [ref=e459] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /cymraeg
            - listitem [ref=e460]:
              - link "Government Digital Service" [ref=e461] [cursor=pointer]:
                - /url: /government/organisations/government-digital-service
          - img [ref=e462]
          - generic [ref=e464]:
            - text: All content is available under the
            - link "Open Government Licence v3.0" [ref=e465] [cursor=pointer]:
              - /url: https://www.nationalarchives.gov.uk/doc/open-government-licence/version/3/
            - text: ", except where otherwise stated"
        - link "© Crown copyright" [ref=e467] [cursor=pointer]:
          - /url: https://www.nationalarchives.gov.uk/information-management/re-using-public-sector-information/uk-government-licensing-framework/crown-copyright/
```
